phone.loginSubtitle: Enter your phone number to send a verification code
phone.registerSubtitle: Enter your phone number to create a new account
phone.label: Phone Number
phone.security: Your data is protected and secure
phone.termsPrefix: By creating an account, you agree to the

terms.title: Terms & Conditions
terms.subtitle: A simple overview of how Jahez works and what we expect from every customer using the app.
terms.intro: Using the app means you agree to these terms. We wrote them in a clear, mobile-friendly way so they are easy to review before you continue.
highlights: Use accurate account details and keep your verification code private.
Orders, delivery estimates, and availability can change based on restaurant capacity and your location.
Abusive behavior, fraudulent activity, or misuse of promotions may lead to account restrictions.

sections.title: Using your account
sections.body: You are responsible for the phone number and profile details linked to your account. Please make sure the information you provide is correct, current, and belongs to you.

sections.title: Orders and payments
sections.body: When you place an order, you confirm that the items, address, and payment method are correct. Final pricing may include delivery fees, taxes, service charges, or restaurant-specific adjustments shown before checkout.

sections.title: Delivery experience
sections.body: Estimated delivery times are provided for convenience and may vary because of traffic, weather, restaurant preparation time, or courier demand. We always aim for a smooth experience, but timing cannot be guaranteed in every case.

sections.title: Fair use and safety
sections.body: Please use the app respectfully. Attempts to abuse refunds, promotions, payment systems, or customer support channels may result in suspended access while the issue is reviewed.

sections.title: Updates to these terms
sections.body: We may update these terms when the service evolves or legal requirements change. The latest version inside the app replaces older versions once it is published.

terms.supportBody: If anything in these terms is unclear, contact support before placing your next order. We want the experience to feel transparent and safe.

otp.title: Enter Verification Code
otp.subtitle: We sent a 6-digit code to
otp.securityNote: Your code is private, don't share it

error.expired: Code has expired, request a new one
error.tooMany: Too many attempts, wait a moment and try again
error.alreadySent: Code already sent, check your phone
error.limitReached: Too many requests, try again in {{hours}} hour(s)

location.title: Your location
location.body: We use your location to personalise nearby services and save your delivery coordinates accurately.
location.permissionBody: Allow location access to auto-detect your position and preview it on the map before continuing.
location.denied: Location access is currently blocked. Enable it from settings to use the map preview.
location.previewUnavailable: Map preview is temporarily unavailable, but your current location was captured successfully.

privacy.title: Your privacy matters
privacy.body: We use this information to improve your shopping experience and provide personalised offers.

logout.alreadySent: Code already sent, check your phone
logout.notFound: User not found, check the number
logout.blocked: This number is blocked, contact support
